Yes price is on a downtrend and overall it was not a negative trade and if I were to enter my entry would probably be where you marked the stop loss even though the trade would have lost which is fine but overall the trade was not bad || notes: The size of the trade is very similar to some trades I've made which is good as you put the take profit which would've resulted in a 1% price profit which is realistic as generally speaking when entering trades you should not be especially price to move more than 2% up and 2% down per trade so this kind of entry is good

entry looks good as you waited for prince to retest 4690 level which is great as we can see price has created a lower high level there recently which makes it a not too bad entry however the take profit is too far up as that would be a 2.25% growth in price which is quite the movement and besides that you should not have placed the take profit above 4766 as that was the peak price for the week and the turning point for the downtrend which makes it a strong resistance level but the stop loss position was not bade as it was placed high below the last lower high before price broke the downtrend pattern || notes: If you respected the previous high of the 7th May 4pm then the trade would have been successful as we could see once price moved to that level it bounced off and came back down - naturally this will not always be the case but its something to take into consideration of possibilities

yes price went up and came back down to retest a lower high level but first you're already in a trade on a similar analysis and second you're not respecting the high of the week and 3rd your stop loss and take profit are too wide! 4.27% growth in price is extreme bullish movement which we have no signs of happening as price has not been volitile so how can we expect price to make such plays but lets give a scenario that price broke the 4764 high of the week and came back to rest that I can make an argument of price climbing that high but even then its not the most realistic trade to make || notes: Make the range of % for price when it comes to your stop loss and take profit smaller as we are not exactly seeing volatile plays being made
